group_1.textRight: So...

group_1.textLeft: We were sent back to the Ark of Feelings...
What about Miss Perenelle and the others...?

group_1.textRight: Oh, they're here!

group_1.textLeft: As my true intention,
I would like to question about
Perenelle having a daughter who looks just like@Tart...

group_1.textRight: I'll leave it to your imagination as to why.

group_1.textLeft: Okay, I'll refrain from pursuing it until this matter@is settled...
Instead...
Have you discovered anything about
the mystery of Tart's memories disappearing from@people's minds?

group_1.textRight: Unfortunately, nothing...

group_1.textLeft: To erase the living proof of Tart's existence...
If it's someone's doing, I will never forgive them!
If someone could do something like this,
it's probably that person known as the@Traitor Queen...

group_1.textRight: The once worst Witch, Isabeau,
was certainly defeated by Tart,@who sacrificed her life.
And five years ago, we also defeated@her surviving daughter, Minou...

group_1.textLeft: Yes...we put an end to her with our own hands.
I heard about that from Mum.
The masterminds of the English faction@disappeared completely after that...
Thanks to Miss Melissa and Miss Elisa!

group_1.textRight: ...Yes, these two
have been protecting Europe after La Pucelle was@gone.
There is no doubt they are true heroes.

group_1.textLeft: When Tart defeated Isabeau, everything was@essentially over.
...We just...
...didn't want Tart's feelings to come to nothing.

group_1.progressNarration: [textBlack:This was nearly a decade ago...@Jeanne La Pucelle's final enemy was a@formidable Magical Girl named Isabeau,@the former Queen of France...]
[textBlack:In the year 1431, she, who was the@mastermind of the English faction,@was defeated by Miss Jeanne.]
[textBlack:And in the year 1435, Miss Melissa and@Miss Elisa defeated Isabeau's surviving@daughter, Minou, which completely@put an end to the masterminds' ambition...]
[textBlack:There seems to be an untold story there...]

[textBlack:However, the wars happening in France@now are not between Magical Girls,@but between people and countries..@That's why Miss Perenelle and the others@are puzzled about why the memories@of La Pucelle are being lost.]

group_1.textRight: ...It's like our world
is being invaded by another world.

group_1.textLeft: Another world...?

group_1.textCenter: Yes...a world where Jeanne La Pucelle doesn't@exist.
And in the sky, there is a red moon.
The first sighting of the red moon was about@forty years ago...
Since then, our world has been gradually corroded@by the world without La Pucelle,
and the red moon started to rise in the sky.

group_1.textLeft: Corroded by another world...@That's quite an insightful view.
...Sorry Nicolas, we will now talk to the one you@can't see.
What do you think, Qube?

group_1.textCenter: It's not a bad hypothesis.@The trigger is unclear,
but around 1400, the world's possibilities split into@two.
One is the "world of the red moon"...@A world where Tart wasn't born.
The other is our world...@A world where Tart saved France.
However, our world has already been corroded@by the world of the red moon,
and the red moon rises in the sky.
Tart's memories are also gradually disappearing@from people's minds...
Nicolas's hypothesis from earlier@can be interpreted in this way.

group_1.textLeft: The world where Miss Jeanne was born@and the world where she wasn't...
So the course of history is swaying between these@two possibilities?

group_1.textRight: Ah, that's why the future records
had no information about La Pucelle...?
Most likely...but for now,
the influence is limited to matters related to@La Pucelle.
If she didn't exist, Isabeau wouldn't have been@defeated,
and there would be more significant changes.
I wonder if there is a reason why the impact is@spreading gradually?

group_1.textCenter: when you sealed people's memories@into this "Ark of Feelings,"
it became another reason for resisting the erosion.

group_1.textLeft: ...So Melissa's and my memories aren't here?

group_1.textRight: We prioritized collecting the most fragile and@likely-to-disappear memories...
We only managed to gather six books' worth...
The memories of La Pucelle were about to vanish@from people's minds.

group_1.textLeft: If Jeanne d'Arc's traces completely disappeared,
and her existence vanished...
Then the future I know will surely no longer exist...?
I'm getting a bit worried...

group_1.textRight: Maybe we should jump into@Kagome's book again,
and check the future once more?
This time, let's all do it together!
Quite a big group, but there's no helping it!
